  • Field Details

    • BAD_NETWORK_ATTEMPT

      public static final String BAD_NETWORK_ATTEMPT
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Method Details

    • get

      public static NetworkUtils get()

    • writeWithoutResponse

      public void writeWithoutResponse(String host, int port, String message)
      Write a message to some host without any expected response from the host
      Parameters:
      host - The host to connect with as a URL string
      port - The port to connect to on the host
      message - The message to send to the host, must not be null

    • pingHost

      public boolean pingHost(String host, int port, int timeout)
      Attempts to ping a host on a specific port with a specific timeout
      Parameters:
      host - The host to ping
      port - The port on the host
      timeout - How long to wait for a successful ping, in milliseconds
      Returns:
      True if the host responds, else false

    • pingWebHost

      public boolean pingWebHost(String host)
      Attempts to ping a web server on port 80 with a timeout of 1000ms
      Parameters:
      host - The host to ping
      Returns:
      True if host responds, else false

    • reportError

      public boolean reportError(String errorMsg)
      Send an error message to a host + port to be logged by that host
      Parameters:
      errorMsg - The error message to be sent
      Returns:
      True if server acknowledges error, else false

    • externalIPAddr

      public String externalIPAddr()
      Get the external IP address when available
      Returns:
      The external IP address if available, else BAD_NETWORK_ATTEMPT
